SuspiciousActivity.Description: Multiple funds transfers to an overseas account potentially linked to a cryptocurrency recovery scam. Suspicious activity reported by client.

Transaction.Purpose: Funds transfer for cryptocurrency recovery services
Funds transfer for cryptocurrency recovery services

Findings.Concern: Client now reports suspicion that they have been scammed. Multiple transfers to the same recipient, coupled with escalating requests for funds, raise significant concerns about fraudulent activity. Recipient located in Nigeria.
